si.t: KT Onboarding Enterprise — B4 Document Management & CLM
Project Tracker Dashboard | Sprints 4, 6, 7, 8 | 60 Tasks | LWC + Apex + Salesforce Flow (No OmniStudio)
FEATURE SUMMARY (COUNTIF / SUMIF from All Tasks)
Document Generation + Vault + KT Sign + Bulk Send
OCR Ingestion + DocuSign/Adobe Sign + CLM + Compliance
AXL Signature Card + Trusted Agent Identity + DocuSign AgentExchange + Full Regression

Define all fields: Status__c picklist (Not Started/In Progress/Awaiting Signature/Complete/Waived/Rejected), Document_Direction__c, Due_Date__c, Is_Required__c, Waiver_Reason__c, Completed_Date__c, Reminder_Count__c, Document_Vault_Entry__c lookup, Document_Template__c lookup
Core object — all B4 tasks depend on this

Fields: Template_Binary__c (ContentDocument lookup), Output_Format__c, Domain__c, Persona__c, Merge_Field_Map__c (JSON LTA), Requires_Signature__c, Signer_Roles__c, Signature_Expiry_Days__c, Is_Active__c, Regulatory_Framework__c (multi-select), Version__c, Language__c

Master-Detail to KT_Onboarding__c; fields: Document_Name__c, Content_Document_Id__c, Document_Type__c, Status__c, Document_Request__c (lookup), Expiry_Date__c, Is_Expired__c (formula), Uploaded_By__c, OCR_Status__c, Version_Number__c, Signature_Status__c, Regulatory_Tag__c

KT_Signature_Request__c: signing provider, status, total/completed signers, expiry, signing order, external envelope ID, completed doc ID. KT_Signer__c: signer role, order, status, signed_at, IP, geolocation, delegation fields. KT_Signature_Audit__c: immutable audit — event type, timestamp, IP, UA, hash value, session token
KT_Signature_Audit__c must have no-delete sharing rule in managed package

KT_OCR_Job__c: OCR_Provider__c, Job_Id__c, Status__c, Extracted_JSON__c (LTA 131k), Extracted_Fields__c, Confidence_Score__c, Review_Notes__c, Reviewed_By__c, Retry_Count__c. KT_Bulk_Document_Job__c: template, total/success/failure counts, Apex_Job_Id__c, status
Create Custom Metadata Types — B4 Config

KT_Document_Template_Config__mdt (domain/persona → template mapping, SLA days). KT_OCR_Provider_Config__mdt (active provider, named credential, polling interval, max retries). KT_OCR_FieldMapping__mdt (provider field path → SF field, confidence threshold, transform). KT_Signature_Config__mdt (per-domain signing settings, expiry, legal notice text)
All B4 services read config from these CMTs — must be deployed before service classes

Create: KT_DocuSign_NC (OAuth 2.0 JWT), KT_AWS_Textract_NC (AWS Sig V4), KT_Azure_FormRecognizer_NC (API Key), KT_AdobeSign_NC (OAuth 2.0 Auth Code), KT_VirusScan_NC (API Key). Document credential setup steps for subscriber org installation.
Must be created before any external API callout class is deployed

Methods: generateDocument(onboardingId, templateId), generateFromDIE(onboardingId) returns List<KT_DocGenResult>, resolveMergeFields(templateJson, onboardingId) — supports 3-level object traversal, getPreviewData() @AuraEnabled. Handles DOCX/PDF output, ContentVersion creation, KT_DocumentVault__c entry creation.
Primary document engine — all generation routes through this service

Manage template library: getActiveTemplates(domain, persona), getTemplateById(id), incrementVersion(templateId), deactivateTemplate(templateId), resolveDIETemplates(onboardingId) — queries KT_Document_Template_Config__mdt for matching domain/persona CMT records.

Called by B1 DIE on KT_Onboarding__c insert. Iterates KT_Document_Template_Config__mdt, creates KT_Document_Request__c records for matched templates. Sets Is_Required__c, Due_Date__c from SLA_Days__c CMT field, Document_Direction__c.
Entry point from B1 DIE — must publish KT_Document_Generated__e on completion

@api onboardingId, templateId. Wire getPreviewData(). Renders HTML preview with merge fields highlighted; unresolved tokens shown in red. handleGenerate() — calls KT_DocumentGeneratorService.generateDocument() and navigates to vault. handleTemplateChange() re-fetches preview.

HR view of all KT_Document_Request__c per onboarding record. Displays status badges, document direction, due date, overdue highlighting. Actions: generate document, request upload, waive (with justification modal). Checklist completion percentage bar.

Drag-drop and file picker upload. File type validation (PDF/JPG/PNG/DOCX — configurable via CMT). Max 25MB Salesforce Files limit. Upload progress indicator. Virus scan triggered pre-ContentVersion insert. Publishes KT_Document_Uploaded__e Platform Event on success.
Used in both HR internal UI and Experience Cloud onboardee portal (B7)

Called before ContentVersion DML insert. POST document binary to KT_VirusScan_NC endpoint. On infected: set KT_DocumentVault__c.Status__c = Quarantined, create HR notification task, prevent ContentVersion creation. On timeout: log and proceed with manual review flag.
AppExchange security requirement — no unscanned files enter org

HR vault grid: card-based document display grouped by Document_Type__c with collapsible sections. Status badges colour-coded. PDF.js inline preview (Static Resource). Version history side panel (ContentVersion SOQL). Quick actions: Preview, Download, Request Signature, Trigger OCR, Waive, Archive.

Simplified mobile-first vault variant for Experience Cloud portal. Onboardee sees own documents only. Guided upload Screen Flow replaces direct component. Document status transparency — HR notes visible per document. PWA offline checklist view. Touch-optimised.

Methods: initiateSigningWorkflow(), dispatchNextInvitation() (Sequential/Parallel mode), handleSignatureComplete() @InvocableMethod, handleDelegation(), completeWorkflow() — assembles final signed doc, creates ContentVersion, publishes KT_Signature_Complete__e. handleExpiryEscalation() called by Scheduled Flow.
Central routing — delegates to KT Sign, DocuSign, or Adobe Sign connector based on provider config
Build KT_ESignatureService.cls — Audit & Legal Data Capture

IP address capture via Apex (VF wrapper for HttpServletRequest equivalent). Geolocation collection from Experience Cloud session. Device UA from request headers. SHA-256 hash: document content hash + signer email + UTC timestamp. One-time JWT session token issuance and invalidation. Creates KT_Signature_Audit__c immediately on signature capture.
Hash stored in KT_Signature_Audit__c.Hash_Value__c — legal tamper-detection evidence
Build ktSignaturePad LWC — KT Sign Native

HTML5 Canvas signature pad. Mouse, touch (iOS/Android), stylus support. 2x pixel density for retina. Legal notice text from KT_Signature_Config__mdt. 'I agree to sign electronically' mandatory checkbox. Session token validation before render. Canvas PNG → base64 → ContentVersion (encrypted at rest). handleSubmit() calls KT_ESignatureOrchestrator.handleSignatureComplete().
Rendered in Experience Cloud portal and internal Lightning pages

HR signing configuration: signer role assignment, sequential/parallel order toggle, expiry date picker. ktESignatureConfig LWC passes config to Screen Flow invocable. Screen Flow step 3 of Document Generation Wizard. Stores config in KT_Signature_Request__c via KT_ESignatureOrchestrator.initiateSigningWorkflow().
Build Document Generation Wizard Screen Flow (5 screens)

Screen 1: Template selection (DIE-suggested + HR additions). Screen 2: Merge data verification via ktDocumentPreview LWC. Screen 3: Signature configuration via ktESignatureConfig LWC. Screen 4: Confirm & Generate (Apex action). Screen 5: Completion with vault links and error details.
Replaces all OmniScript document generation flows

Trigger: KT_Onboarding__c insert (after-save). Calls KT_DocumentChecklistService via Apex Action. Creates KT_Document_Request__c records. Sends portal notification + email to onboardee for inbound-direction documents. Publishes KT_Document_Generated__e Platform Event.
Entry trigger from B2 Journey task instantiation
Build Document Vault Access Control — WITH SHARING + Sharing Rules

KT_Admin: full CRUD all B4 objects. KT_HR_User: CRE on vault/requests, no delete on audit objects. KT_Manager: read own team onboardees via sharing rule (Hiring_Manager__c = CurrentUser). KT_Onboardee (Experience Cloud): read own vault entries via guest-context Apex only. KT_Signature_Audit__c: no update/delete for any permission set.
Build Salesforce Scheduled Flows — Expiry, Reminder, Status

KT_ESignature_Expiry_Check: daily 08:00 — queries pending signing requests at expiry, calls handleExpiryEscalation(). KT_ESignature_Reminder: daily 09:00 — resends signer reminders with throttle. KT_DocumentRequest_Reminder: daily 08:30 — portal + email reminders, max 3 per request. KT_Document_Expiry_Alert: 30/60/90-day cert expiry notifications.

Trigger: KT_Signer__c update where Status changed to Signed. Checks if all sibling KT_Signer__c records for parent KT_Signature_Request__c are Signed. If all signed: updates KT_DocumentVault__c and KT_Document_Request__c to Complete. Publishes KT_Signature_Complete__e Platform Event.
Publish Platform Events — B4 Event Catalog

Define and configure: KT_Document_Uploaded__e (upload pipeline trigger), KT_Document_Generated__e (vault/compliance downstream), KT_Signature_Complete__e (B6 compliance update, Data Cloud), KT_OCR_Job_Complete__e (vault status update, Agentforce HR Copilot action). Configure Platform Event Triggered Flows as subscribers.
All cross-feature integrations depend on these events
Build Bulk Document Send — KT_BulkDocumentBatch.cls + Queueable

KT_BulkDocumentBatch: batch size 25 (callout-safe), iterates onboarding records, calls KT_DocumentGeneratorService per record, dispatches signing. KT_BulkDocumentQueueable: post-processing — update KT_Bulk_Document_Job__c counters, publish Data Cloud events. KT_BulkDocumentJobService: validateCohort(), getBulkJobStatus() @AuraEnabled.
Enterprise tier only — gated via B12 LicenseManager
Build ktBulkDocumentMonitor LWC + Bulk Send Wizard Screen Flow

ktBulkDocumentMonitor: real-time progress bar (processed/total), success/failure counts, auto-refresh every 10s via Lightning Refresh API. Bulk Send Wizard (5-screen Screen Flow): cohort selection, template selection, pre-flight validation, signature config, launch + monitor redirect.
Sprint 4 Apex Unit Tests — Min 85% Coverage

Test classes for: KT_DocumentGeneratorService, KT_DocumentTemplateService, KT_DocumentChecklistService, KT_ESignatureOrchestrator, KT_ESignatureService, KT_VirusScanService, KT_BulkDocumentBatch. Include positive, negative, and bulk test methods. Mock all external callouts via HttpCalloutMock.
Must reach 85% coverage before Sprint 4 package deployment
Sprint 4 UAT — Document Generation, E-Signature, Vault

End-to-end UAT scenarios: document checklist auto-creation from DIE, HR document generation wizard, KT Sign signing flow (mobile + desktop), multi-party sequential signing, delegation, expiry escalation, bulk send (50-record cohort), vault version history, portal upload and checklist view.
Sign-off required before Sprint 6 OCR tasks begin

Populate provider config CMT: AWS Textract and Azure Form Recognizer entries (named credential, endpoint path, polling interval, max retries, is_active). Populate field mapping CMT for: Passport (both providers) — LastName, FirstName, DOB, PassportNumber, ExpiryDate, Nationality. Driver's License — same plus Address. Professional Certificate — certType, issuer, validFrom, validTo.
Populate before OCR service build to enable TDD

Methods: submitJob(), submitToTextract() (sync/async based on page count), submitToAzure() (always async, stores Operation-Location URL), parseAndMap() — maps JSON response to Salesforce fields using KT_OCR_FieldMapping__mdt, applyExtraction() — dynamic DML to update Contact/KT_Onboarding__c on HR acceptance. Provider resolved at runtime from active CMT record.
Provider-agnostic — switching provider requires only CMT change, zero code

Queueable Apex for async OCR result polling. Polls provider every 5s, max 12 attempts (60s total). On success: calls KT_OcrIngestionService.parseAndMap(). On max retries: sets OCR_Status__c = Failed, creates manual review Task assigned to HR queue, logs in KT_OCR_Job__c.

REST endpoint /kt/v1/ocr/callback for async OCR completion notifications from AWS Textract/Azure. Validates provider HMAC-SHA256 payload signature. Triggers result retrieval and field mapping via KT_OcrIngestionService. Publishes KT_OCR_Job_Complete__e Platform Event.
Requires AppExchange security review — inbound REST with payload validation
Build ktOCRReview LWC — HR Review Interface

Field-by-field accept/reject UI. Side-by-side: extracted value vs. current Salesforce record value. Confidence score colour-coded: green ≥90%, amber 70–89%, red <70%. 'Accept All High Confidence' shortcut button (accepts ≥90% fields in one click). On accept: calls KT_OcrIngestionService.applyExtraction().
Build Platform Event Triggered Flow — OCR Upload Pipeline

Subscribes to KT_Document_Uploaded__e. Checks if uploaded document type requires OCR via KT_Document_Template_Config__mdt.Requires_OCR__c. If yes: creates KT_OCR_Job__c, calls KT_OcrIngestionService.submitJob() via Apex Action. Updates KT_DocumentVault__c.OCR_Status__c = Pending.
Configure Agentforce KT HR Copilot — B4 OCR + Document Actions

Agent actions: Detect OCR Discrepancy (post KT_OCR_Job_Complete__e — compare extracted vs. existing record, flag delta via in-app notification). Document Gap Analysis (list incomplete required docs). Bulk Job Status Summary. Signing Escalation Alert. Einstein Trust Layer PII masking configured for passport numbers, DOB, government IDs.
Einstein Trust Layer PII masking mandatory before production
Configure Agentforce KT Compliance Auditor — B4 Document Actions

Agent actions: Missing Compliance Documents (cross-reference vault vs. B6 compliance rules). Expiring Document Alert (30/60/90-day vault scan). Audit Report Generation (on-demand: certified PDF of complete document vault history via B4 Document Generator).
Build CLM Status Workflow — KT_DocumentVault__c Contract Lifecycle

Implement contract lifecycle states: Draft → Legal Review → Counter-Sign → Fully Executed → Archived. Record-Triggered Flow on KT_DocumentVault__c.Status__c transitions for Document_Type__c = Contract. Creates review tasks, sends notifications, enforces stage gate (no counter-sign until legal review complete). Configurable approvers per domain via CMT.
Enterprise tier CLM — gated via B12 LicenseManager
Build Audit-Ready Document Export — Certified PDF Generation

On-demand generation of timestamped, certified PDF audit package per onboarding record: all vault documents + signature audit trail + OCR verification status + version history. Apex service KT_AuditExportService.cls assembles ContentVersion records into multi-page PDF. Adds certification footer with export timestamp and hash.
Used by Compliance Auditor agent action and manual HR export

Methods: createEnvelope() — POST /envelopes with base64 document, signer tabs from KT_DocumentTemplate__c config. sendEnvelope(). getEnvelopeStatus(). retrieveCompletedDocument() — stores as new ContentVersion. Feature gate check via B12 LicenseManager before any DocuSign API call.
DocuSign add-on — B12 feature gate required

REST @RestResource endpoint /kt/v1/docusign/webhook. Validates DocuSign Connect HMAC-SHA256 payload signature. Processes status events: sent/delivered/completed/declined. Correlates via External_Envelope_Id__c. On completed: triggers retrieveCompletedDocument(), updates KT_Signer__c and KT_DocumentVault__c. Populates KT_Signature_Audit__c.

Methods: createAgreement(), sendAgreement(), webhookCallback(). Agreement creation with participant sets. Webhook registration on agreement creation. Completed document retrieval on AGREEMENT_ACTION_COMPLETED event. Feature gate check. Follows same KT_Signature_Request__c / KT_Signer__c data model as DocuSign connector.
Adobe Sign add-on — separate B12 gate from DocuSign

REST @RestResource /kt/v1/adobesign/webhook. Validates Adobe Sign webhook verification token. Processes AGREEMENT_ACTION_COMPLETED, AGREEMENT_RECALLED, AGREEMENT_EXPIRED events. Same downstream processing pattern as DocuSign webhook handler.
Configure Shield Platform Encryption — B4 PII Fields

Apply Shield Platform Encryption to: KT_Signer__c.IP_Address__c, KT_Signer__c.Geolocation, KT_OCR_Job__c.Extracted_JSON__c, KT_DocumentVault__c PII reference fields. Document BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) option for Ultra tier customers. Validate Einstein OCR access still functions with encrypted fields.
Mandatory for HIPAA/SOX regulated customer orgs

Enable Salesforce Field Audit Trail on: KT_DocumentVault__c.Status__c, KT_Signature_Request__c.Status__c, KT_OCR_Job__c.Status__c, KT_Signer__c.Status__c. Set 10-year retention policy. Validate audit log access via Setup > Field Audit Trail. Document export procedure for compliance audits.
Regulated industry requirement — export procedure must be in runbook

Data load KT_DocumentTemplate__c records across 8 domains: Healthcare (40 templates), Manufacturing (30), Retail (25), Finance (30), Technology (25), Government/Public Sector (20), Construction (15), Generic/All Domains (20+). Includes offer letters, NDAs, compliance acknowledgments, onboarding checklists, certificates.
Template binary files must be uploaded to org as ContentDocument before data load
Sprint 6 Apex Unit Tests — OCR, DocuSign, Adobe Sign

Test classes: KT_OcrIngestionService, KT_OcrPollingBatch, KT_OcrCallbackHandler, KT_DocuSignEnvelopeService, KT_DocuSignWebhookHandler, KT_AdobeSignService, KT_AdobeSignWebhookHandler, KT_AuditExportService. Mock all HTTP callouts. Test OCR field mapping transforms. Test HMAC signature validation.
Sprint 6 UAT — OCR, CLM, DocuSign, Adobe Sign

UAT scenarios: OCR passport upload and HR field review (Textract provider), OCR provider switch to Azure via CMT (zero code change), DocuSign envelope creation and webhook completion callback, Adobe Sign agreement creation, CLM draft-to-archive workflow, bulk audit PDF export.

MCP tool definition: input schema {onboarding_id: string, doc_type: string, due_date?: string}, output {request_id: string, upload_url: string, deadline: string, status: string}. Apex @InvocableMethod KT_MCPDocumentRequestHandler.requestDocument(). Validates onboarding record exists and doc_type maps to active template. Creates KT_Document_Request__c. Returns authenticated upload URL.
Headless 360 MCP — Enterprise tier; B12 feature gate

MCP tool definition: input {document_id: string}, output {verification_status: string, extracted_fields: object, confidence_score: number, discrepancies: array}. Apex KT_MCPDocumentVerifyHandler.verifyDocument(). Retrieves KT_DocumentVault__c and associated KT_OCR_Job__c. Returns structured verification result with field-level confidence scores.

MCP tool: input {onboarding_id: string, filter_status?: string, filter_type?: string}, output array of {document_name, document_type, status, signature_status, expiry_date, vault_entry_id}. Apex KT_MCPVaultHandler.getVault(). Respects WITH SHARING access control. Supports filter parameters.

MCP tool: input {vault_id: string, signer_list: array, signing_order: string, expiry_days: number}, output {signature_request_id: string, status: string}. Apex KT_MCPSigningHandler.dispatchSigning(). Validates vault entry exists and document is in signable state. Calls KT_ESignatureOrchestrator.initiateSigningWorkflow().

Unit tests for all 4 MCP handler Apex classes. Integration tests via Agentforce playground: invoke kt_request_document from HR Copilot conversation, verify kt_verify_document returns correct OCR data, test kt_dispatch_signing creates signature request. Load test with 50 concurrent MCP invocations.

Apex class that serialises KT_Signature_Request__c data for AXL card rendering. Output JSON: {document_name, signer_name, signer_email, deadline, document_preview_url, sign_now_deeplink, request_id}. sign_now_deeplink uses one-time session token from KT_ESignatureService. Called by AXL card definition Apex action.
Build AXL Document Signature Card — Slack/Teams

AXL card definition: document name, signer, deadline (colour-coded: green/amber/red by days remaining), 'Sign Now' button (deeplink to ktSignaturePad LWC mobile signing flow). 'Delegate' secondary action. 'View Document' preview button. Card dispatched when KT_Signer__c invitation sent. Card updated (dismissed) when KT_Signature_Complete__e received.
AXL — requires Slack/Teams org connection configured in Salesforce Setup
Trusted Agent Identity — High-Value Signature Authorization

Implement Trusted Agent Identity for SOX/HIPAA high-value document signatures. KT_ESignatureOrchestrator checks KT_Signature_Config__mdt.Require_Trusted_Identity__c before calling completeWorkflow(). If true: triggers mobile-push biometric confirmation via Trusted Agent Identity API. Signature blocked until biometric confirmed.
Ultra tier only — B12 feature gate
Upgrade DocuSign Connector to AgentExchange MCP Tool (Sprint 8)

Replace KT_DocuSign_NC Named Credential connector with first-class DocuSign MCP tool from Salesforce AgentExchange marketplace. Update KT_DocuSignEnvelopeService.cls to delegate to AgentExchange tool. Maintain existing KT_Signature_Request__c data model — no downstream breaking changes.
Replaces custom connector — backward-compatible via data model

UAT: AXL signature card renders correctly in Slack and Teams. Sign Now deeplink opens mobile ktSignaturePad with correct document and session token. Trusted Agent Identity biometric prompt triggers for SOX documents. Delegation from AXL card creates KT_Signer__c delegate record. Card dismissal on completion event.
Full B4 Regression Test Suite + AppExchange Security Review Prep

End-to-end regression across all B4 features: document generation, vault, KT Sign, DocuSign, Adobe Sign, OCR (both providers), bulk send, CLM workflow, MCP tools, AXL cards. AppExchange security review preparation: SOQL injection audit (all WITH SHARING), HMAC validation on all REST handlers, Named Credential audit, virus scan coverage, no credential in CMT/code.
Final gate before AppExchange managed package submission
Domain code + Persona code → required document list + SLA days
DIE calls KT_DocumentChecklistService on KT_Onboarding__c insert; creates KT_Document_Request__c records per template. B4 publishes KT_Document_Generated__e back to B1.
Journey stage gate blocked until all required KT_Document_Request__c are Complete
B4 document completion status read by B2 stage gate check. B2 task instantiation triggers B4 KT_Document_Request_Flow.
E-signature captured in Smart Form stored as ContentVersion via B4 vault
Smart Form submission triggers B4 signing workflow for forms requiring e-signature. KT_Signature_Audit__c created for all signatures regardless of source form.
Uploaded identity documents (passports, driving licences) routed to B4 OCR pipeline before B5 verification
B5 triggers OCR ingestion via KT_Document_Uploaded__e Platform Event. B4 extracts structured fields; B5 reads KT_OCR_Job__c.Extracted_Fields__c for identity verification.
Signed compliance documents (HIPAA consent, OSHA acknowledgment) published to B6 for compliance record update
KT_Signature_Complete__e consumed by B6 Compliance Engine to mark compliance obligations satisfied. KT_DocumentVault__c.Regulatory_Tag__c used for compliance rule matching.
Onboardee-facing document upload and vault view embedded in Experience Cloud portal
ktDocumentVaultPortal LWC deployed to B7 portal pages. Upload via ktDocumentUpload LWC. B4 document checklist drives B7 portal task list completion tracking.
Training completion certificate auto-generated on course pass using B4 Document Generator
B9 calls KT_DocumentGeneratorService.generateDocument() with certificate template on LMS course completion event. Certificate stored in KT_DocumentVault__c with Expiry_Date__c.
Document completion rates, signing SLA breach metrics, OCR accuracy rates streamed to B10 dataset
Platform Events published by B4 consumed by B10 dataset refresh flows. KT_DocumentVault__c and KT_Signature_Request__c queried by CRM Analytics dashboards.
DocuSign add-on, Adobe Sign add-on, bulk send, OCR ingestion, CLM, AXL, Trusted Identity gated by tier
All gated B4 service classes call B12 LicenseManager.isFeatureEnabled() before execution. KT_FeatureGateException raised with upgrade prompt if feature not in subscriber tier.
